actions.name: 未命名事件
actions.caption: 未命名事件
actions.expression:
SELECT cght.sid,
       cght.kpgc,
       cght.sccj,
       cght.cgry,
       cght.htje,
       cght.wxht,
       cght.cgbm,
       cght.szdq,
       cght.khmc,
       cght.ywry,
       cght.ywbm,
       cght.jsfs
FROM cght 
WHERE (cght.hthm=[预付货款.采购合同]) 
ORDER BY cght.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 生产厂家_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 生产厂家_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT newcwcs.company_name,newcwcs.sid,newcwcs.bank,newcwcs.zh 
FROM newcwcs 
ORDER BY newcwcs.company_name ASC

actions.name: 未命名事件397
actions.caption: 未命名事件397
actions.expression:
SELECT cwcs.sid,cwcs.cs_id 
FROM cwcs 
WHERE (cwcs.company_name=[预付货款.生产厂家]) 
ORDER BY cwcs.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 开户银行_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 开户银行_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT wbyhzl.sid,wbyhzl.zwmc,wbyhzl.zh 
FROM wbyhzl 
ORDER BY wbyhzl.sid ASC

actions.name: 未命名事件629
actions.caption: 未命名事件629

fields.caption: 银行名称
fields.output: 预付货款.我方银行名称

actions.expression:
SELECT fkyh.sid,
       fkyh.custId,
       fkyh.wfyhmc,
       fkyh.corpCode,
       fkyh.fkdq,
       fkyh.subaAccountSerial
FROM fkyh 
WHERE (fkyh.wstt=[预付货款.我司抬头]) 
  AND (fkyh.fkdq=[预付货款.付款地区]) 
  AND (fkyh.payAcc=[预付货款.付款地区]) 
ORDER BY fkyh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT gchk.wfyhzh,
       gchk.wfyhmc,
       gchk.custId,
       gchk.corpCode,
       gchk.subaAccountSerial
FROM gchk 
WHERE (gchk.wstt=[预付货款.我司抬头]) 
GROUP BY gchk.wfyhzh,gchk.wfyhmc,gchk.custId ,gchk.corpCode,gchk.subaAccountSerial

actions.name: 采购合同_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 采购合同_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT fksp.fphm,
       fksp.rxr,
       fksp.sjhm,
       fksp.sjcy12,
       fksp.zsl,
       fkspsheet2.bbfph,
       fkspsheet2.sjcy,
       fkspsheet2.gczj,
       fkspsheet2.cpbh,
       fkspsheet2.yfje,
       fkspsheet2.hthm
FROM fksp,fkspsheet2 
WHERE (fksp.rid=fkspsheet2.pid) 
  AND (fkspsheet2.fkbh=[预付货款.付款编号])

actions.expression:
SELECT fkspsheet.sid,
       fkspsheet.zwpm,
       fkspsheet.dj,
       fkspsheet.dw,
       fkspsheet.bz1,
       fkspsheet.xs,
       fkspsheet.zsl,
       fkspsheet.sybz,
       fkspsheet.wxfp,
       fksp.hthm,
       fkspsheet.cpbh,
       fksp.csmc,
       fksp.rxfs,
       fksp.rxr,
       fksp.sjhm
FROM fksp,fkspsheet 
WHERE (fksp.rid=fkspsheet.pid) 
  AND (fksp.hthm=[预付货款.采购合同]) 
ORDER BY fkspsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-扣点金额
actions.caption: 计算-扣点金额
actions.expression: [预付货款.付款金额]*[预付货款.扣   点]/100

actions.name: 外销发票编辑框
actions.expression:
SELECT wxht.order_id,wxht.sid,wxht.dateis,wxht.kh_id
FROM wxht where permission('外销合同')
ORDER BY wxht.sid ASC
actions.caption: 外销发票编辑框

FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.ryxm ASC
